name: Casamigos Reposado
notes: caramel, cocoa, dried fruit, spicy oak, sweet agave
best: Celebrity tequila ask, lounge demo, gift pour.
avoid: Agave purist who rejects sweet profiles.
why: Recommend when the member names Casamigos — vanilla, caramel, and easy sweetness.

name: Chivas Regal 12 Year
notes: wild herbs, heather, honey, orchard fruit, vanilla, hazelnut, butterscotch
best: Blend beginner, mild cigar, classic brand ask.
why: Recommend when the member wants an easy blended Scotch — honey, apple, and hazelnut.
catalogLine: Chivas Regal 12 Year · Scotland · $38 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: honey, apple
blurb: Chivas 12 — honey and apple in a blend your father probably drank. Approachable prestige that still works beside a cigar.

name: Clase Azul Reposado

why: Recommend when visual luxury and tequila recognition matter — vanilla, caramel, iconic ceramic.

name: Courvoisier VSOP Exclusif
notes: stone fruit, jasmine, gingerbread, silky finish
best: VSOP cognac, classic brand, after-dinner cigar.
why: Recommend when approachable cognac is needed — apricot, vanilla, and oak.
catalogLine: Courvoisier VSOP Exclusif · Cognac, France · $45 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: apricot, vanilla
blurb: Courvoisier VSOP — apricot and vanilla in a classic French VSOP. Cognac entry before you reach for Hennessy XO.

name: Dalmore 12 Year
notes: citrus, chocolate, aromatic spices, seville orange, dried fruit, vanilla, roasted coffee, dark chocolate
best: Sherry Scotch, orange note request, classic lounge pairing.
why: Recommend when orange and chocolate in Scotch should echo a maduro — marmalade, sherry, cocoa.
catalogLine: Dalmore 12 Year · Highland, Scotland · $75 · 86 proof (43.0% ABV) · Notes: orange marmalade, chocolate
blurb: Dalmore 12 — orange marmalade and sherry over chocolate and oak. The Highland Scotch cigar bars have loved for decades.

name: Diplomático Reserva Exclusiva

notes: orange peel, toffee, licorice, fudge, dark chocolate, dried fruit, molasses
best: Cigar-first pairing, rum curious member, dessert-profile spirit.
avoid: User wants dry agricole rhum or zero sweetness.

catalogLine: Diplomático Reserva Exclusiva · Venezuela · $42 · 80 proof (40.0% ABV) · Notes: brown sugar, orange
blurb: Diplomático Reserva Exclusiva — orange peel and toffee over fudge, dark chocolate, and dried fruit. Brand-official cigar-pairing rum.

name: Del Maguey Vida Mezcal

blurb: Del Maguey Vida — espadín mezcal with smoke and roasted agave. The mezcal pour that teaches the category without boutique pricing.

name: Don Julio Reposado

blurb: Don Julio Reposado — the tequila people buy twice. Vanilla and oak over cooked agave when someone is done with shots and ready to sip.
